description: The TubeBoxMesh component is used to generate geometry that is used with a MeshRenderer.

fields.SegmentPoints: The divisions in geometry/edges in the tube's circular direction.
fields.UVScale: The scale of material detail on the mesh.
fields.UVOffset: The offset of material detail on the mesh.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to view the geometry. Don't forget to use a Material.
